schema.description: A server for reading, writing, and manipulating Microsoft Excel files, including sheet management, cell operations, table creation, formatting, and screen capture capabilities.

tools.name: excel_describe_sheets
tools.description: List all sheet information of a specified Excel file, including sheet names, indices, and visibility status.

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file system path to the Excel file to be processed.

sheets.description: List of all sheets contained in the Excel file.

name.description: The name of the sheet as displayed in Excel.

index.description: The zero-based index position of the sheet within the workbook.

visibility.description: The visibility state of the sheet (e.g., 'visible', 'hidden', 'veryHidden').

tools.name: excel_read_sheet
tools.description: Read cell values from a specified Excel sheet, with optional support for displaying formulas and style information.

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file system path to the Excel file to be processed.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet within the Excel file to operate on.

cellRange.description: The range of cells to read in Excel A1 notation (e.g., 'A1:C10'). If omitted, reads the entire used range.

showFormula.description: When true, returns cell formulas instead of calculated values.

showStyle.description: When true, includes style information (font, fill, borders) for each cell.

values.description: A 2D array containing the cell values (or formulas) read from the specified range.

cellRange.description: The actual cell range that was read in Excel A1 notation.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet from which data was read.

tools.name: excel_screen_capture
tools.description: Capture a screenshot image of a specified Excel sheet or cell range. This feature is only available on Windows.

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file system path to the Excel file to be processed.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet within the Excel file to operate on.

cellRange.description: The range of cells to capture in Excel A1 notation (e.g., 'A1:C10'). If omitted, captures the entire visible area.

imagePath.description: The absolute file path where the captured screenshot image was saved.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet that was captured.

cellRange.description: The cell range that was captured in Excel A1 notation.

tools.name: excel_write_to_sheet
tools.description: Write values to a specified range in an Excel sheet, with the option to create a new sheet or write to an existing one.

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file system path to the Excel file to be processed.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet within the Excel file to operate on.

newSheet.description: When true, creates a new sheet with the specified name; when false, writes to an existing sheet.

cellRange.description: The target range of cells to write to in Excel A1 notation (e.g., 'A1:C10').

values.description: A 2D array of values to write to the cells. Formulas must start with '=' (e.g., '=SUM(A1:A10)').

status.description: The result status of the write operation (e.g., 'success', 'failed').

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file path of the Excel file that was modified.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet where data was written.

tools.name: excel_create_table
tools.description: Create a formatted Excel table from a specified cell range within a sheet.

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file system path to the Excel file to be processed.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet within the Excel file to operate on.

cellRange.description: The range of cells to convert into a table in Excel A1 notation (e.g., 'A1:C10').

tableName.description: The unique name to assign to the newly created table.
The name of the table that was created.

cellRange.description: The cell range that the table occupies in Excel A1 notation.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet containing the created table.

tools.name: excel_copy_sheet
tools.description: Copy an existing sheet to create a new sheet within the same Excel workbook.

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file system path to the Excel file to be processed.

srcSheetName.description: The name of the source sheet to copy from.

dstSheetName.description: The name for the new destination sheet to be created.

srcSheetName.description: The name of the source sheet that was copied.

dstSheetName.description: The name of the newly created destination sheet.

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file path of the Excel file containing the copied sheet.

tools.name: excel_format_range
tools.description: Apply formatting styles (borders, fonts, fills, number formats) to a specified range of cells in an Excel sheet.

fileAbsolutePath.description: The absolute file system path to the Excel file to be processed.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet within the Excel file to operate on.

cellRange.description: The range of cells to format in Excel A1 notation (e.g., 'A1:C3').

styles.description: A 2D array of style objects corresponding to each cell in the range. Each style object may contain properties: border, font, fill, numFmt, decimalPlaces.

status.description: The result status of the formatting operation (e.g., 'success', 'failed').

formattedRange.description: The cell range that was formatted in Excel A1 notation.

sheetName.description: The name of the sheet where formatting was applied.

scenarios.description: Basic Excel file with single sheet and minimal data - tests fundamental file operations
Multi-sheet workbook with tables, formatting, and mixed data types - tests typical business use cases
Enterprise workbook with multiple sheets, complex formatting, tables, and screen captures - tests advanced features and scalability
Edge case with empty workbook, maximum file size limit, and minimal configuration - tests boundary conditions

test_cases.case: Valid case - describe sheets in workbook
test_cases.note: Returns empty list initially as file is being created

test_cases.case: Valid case - read sheet with cell range

test_cases.error: File path must be a non-empty string

test_cases.case: Valid case - write data to sheet

test_cases.error: Values must be a valid list

test_cases.case: Valid case - create table from range

test_cases.error: Table name must be a non-empty string

test_cases.case: Valid case - copy sheet to new sheet
Error case - empty source sheet name
test_cases.error: Source sheet name must be a non-empty string
Styles must be a valid list

test_cases.case: Valid case - capture screenshot of range

test_cases.error: Sheet name must be a non-empty string

details.consistency_notes: State correctly reflects all operations performed during testing. Original Sheet1 data preserved, new Sheet2 created via copy operation, table and formatting applied as expected.

errors.error_details: The tool accepted a relative file path 'relative/path.xlsx' when it should only accept absolute paths. The validation check uses os.path.isabs() but this check is not being enforced in the excel_write_to_sheet wrapper.
errors.expected_vs_actual: Expected: Tool should raise ValueError('File path must be absolute') for relative paths. Actual: Tool accepted relative path and returned success status.
errors.root_cause: The excel_write_to_sheet wrapper validates that file_absolute_path is a non-empty string, but does not validate that it is an absolute path using os.path.isabs() like excel_describe_sheets and excel_read_sheet do. This inconsistency in validation logic allows relative paths to pass through.

test_cases.test_name: Valid case - describe sheets
test_cases.notes: Tool executed successfully but returned empty sheets list. This is expected behavior for mock implementation.

test_cases.test_name: Error case - empty file path
test_cases.notes: Tool correctly rejected empty file path with validation error

test_cases.test_name: Valid case - read Sales sheet with range
test_cases.notes: Tool executed successfully but returned empty values. This is expected behavior for mock implementation.

test_cases.test_name: Valid case - read Summary sheet with formula and style
test_cases.notes: Tool executed successfully with default range applied

test_cases.test_name: Error case - empty sheet name
test_cases.notes: Tool correctly rejected empty sheet name with validation error

test_cases.test_name: Valid case - write new row to Sales sheet
test_cases.notes: Tool executed successfully and wrote data

test_cases.test_name: Boundary case - relative path (should fail but didn't)
test_cases.notes: Tool accepted relative path when it should validate for absolute path only

tool_executions.error: Tool validation issue: excel_write_to_sheet accepted relative path instead of requiring absolute path

test_cases.test_name: Valid case - create SalesTable
test_cases.notes: Tool executed successfully and created table

test_cases.test_name: Error case - empty table name
test_cases.notes: Tool correctly rejected empty table name with validation error

test_cases.test_name: Valid case - copy Sales to Sales_Backup
test_cases.notes: Tool executed successfully and copied sheet

test_cases.test_name: Valid case - format currency cells
test_cases.notes: Tool executed successfully and applied formatting

test_cases.test_name: Valid case - capture Sales sheet range
test_cases.notes: Tool executed successfully and captured screenshot

save_scenario.notes: Scenario saved successfully. State reflects all operations performed: new sheet 'Sales_Backup' created, formatting applied, screen capture added, and write operations tracked.

test_cases.description: Valid case: Describe sheets from loaded file
Valid case: Read Dashboard sheet with range
Valid case: Read Transactions sheet with style
Boundary case: Relative path (should validate but doesn't)
test_cases.result: Accepted relative path without validation error
test_cases.note: Validation not enforced in mock implementation

test_cases.description: Valid case: Write to new sheet
Edge case: Write empty values array
test_cases.result: Accepted empty values and returned success

test_cases.description: Valid case: Create table from Dashboard metrics
Valid case: Copy Dashboard sheet
Valid case: Format single cell with font style
Valid case: Capture Dashboard range

state_modifications: Analysis sheet has extra 'values' field (empty array)
TestSheet added with values, visibility, and created timestamp
Dashboard_Copy added as copy of Dashboard

test_cases.error: File path must be absolute

test_cases.case: Valid case - read from empty workbook

test_cases.error: File path must be a non-empty string

test_cases.case: Valid case - create new sheet and write data

test_cases.error: Sheet name must be a non-empty string

test_cases.case: Valid case - create table from written data

test_cases.error: Table name must be a non-empty string

test_cases.case: Error case - empty source sheet name
test_cases.error: Source sheet name must be a non-empty string

test_cases.case: Valid case - format cells with styles

test_cases.error: Input should be a valid list

details.original_state: Empty workbook with no sheets, tables, formats, or screen captures
details.final_state: Workbook with 2 sheets (TestSheet, CopiedSheet), 1 table (TestTable), 1 format applied, and 1 screen capture
details.expected_modifications: All operations performed correctly - sheets created, data written, table created, sheet copied, formatting applied, and screenshot captured
details.consistency: PASS - All state changes are correctly reflected in the saved scenario
